cause_analysis.narrative: YokoMD churned on 2026-04-01 after 144 days with Zoca. 1 inbound message(s) went unanswered for 5+ days — this is the clearest operational failure on Zoca's side.
recommendations: [SLA] 1 inbound message(s) went unanswered for 5+ days. Enforce a hard rule: every inbound gets a human response within 24h, every day of the week.
[SLA example] On 2026-03-29 via sms, client wrote: "Hi this is Dr. Yoko's office, I saw that we just missed your call. How can I help?…" — no outbound response in 30 days.
